name: ASUS PRIME B760M-F D4, Intel B760 LGA 1700 micro-ATX motherboard, PCIe 4.0, two PCIe 4.0 M.2 slots, DDR4, Realtek 1Gb Ethernet, HDMI, SATA 6 Gbps, USB 5Gbps ports, Aura Sync
shortName: ASUS PRIME B760M-F D4, Intel B760 LGA 1700 micro-ATX motherboard
description: ASUS PRIME B760M-F D4 is a budget micro-ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with DDR4 and PCIe 4.0 support.
